name: Tablet
description: Smooth tablets queue in tidy columns, lengthening and re-colouring on redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); width: 60%; height: @pick(100%, 100%, 200%, 300%); margin-left: 20%; border-radius: 999px; -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
